title: cola clavata
intro: Cola clavata, also known as the cola nut tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Africa and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. The plant's seeds contain caffeine and other medicinal compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, indigestion, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cola clavata include improved cognitive function, increased energy, and relief from headaches and fatigue, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Cola clavata include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
